description: A candid wide-shot color photograph (no on-image text or design) from the DHS Juneteenth flag-raising ceremony. A large group of roughly 40-50 attendees in business attire stand grouped together on a brick walkway for a group photo beneath three tall flagpoles flying (left to right) a state/agency flag, the U.S. American flag, and the red Juneteenth flag, set against a clear blue sky with large green trees. Rows of empty white folding chairs flank the foreground; a Coast Guard member in dress uniform stands at far right. This is a documentary event/group photo, not a designed meme or graphic; mark is_designed=false.
